steps.title: Find the sorting rate
steps.content: The machine sorts 18 pounds in 6 minutes. Divide to find the rate: $$\frac{18 \text{ pounds}}{6 \text{ minutes}} = 3 \text{ pounds per minute}$$

steps.title: Calculate time for 108 pounds
steps.content: At 3 pounds per minute, divide 108 by the rate to find the time: $$\frac{108 \text{ pounds}}{3 \text{ pounds per minute}} = 36 \text{ minutes}$$ This matches the correct answer — C is correct.
